User.title: User
User.description: Represents a user profile in the application.

email.description: The email address of the user.

role.description: The role of the user (Student, Teacher, Admin).

avatarUrl.description: URL of the user's avatar image.

hasPaidAssessment.description: Indicates if the user has paid for the premium assessment.

Assessment.title: Assessment
Assessment.description: Stores the results of a user's career assessment.

primaryPathway.description: The recommended career pathway based on the assessment (STEM, Arts & Sports Science, Social Sciences).

confidenceScore.description: A score indicating the confidence level of the pathway recommendation.

FeatureFlag.title: FeatureFlag
FeatureFlag.description: Represents a feature flag or system configuration.

id.description: Unique identifier for the flag (e.g., assessment_paywall, admin_config).

isEnabled.description: Indicates whether the feature is enabled.

priceKES.description: The price of the feature in KES.

adminToken.description: The secret token used to claim admin privileges.

definition.description: Stores system settings including admin tokens and paywalls.

firestore.reasoning: Global administrative access enabled. All paths are publicly readable and writable to support the requested Admin Command Center without authentication requirements. This resolves permission errors for unauthenticated users checking system status.
